{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Reputation
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Reputation]] is considered a [[sacred artist]]'s greatest treasure.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c2">''Blackflame'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
